pageContext.name: Harry Potter with Sword of Gryffindor Mini Co.
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the Harry Potter with Sword of Gryffindor Mini Co. Collectible Figure from the Mini Co. Series line.  These hand-painted Harry Potter collectible figures were created by Iron Studios and are the perfect size for any desk or shelf no matter the size of your Harry Potter collection.  A must-have for fans of Harry Potter collectibles!
